title: Bounded AI Delegated Guidance Refresh Execution
objective: Execute the next delegated dual-lane packet after Packet 836 publication by reusing the unchanged authoritative-host helper surface for a fresh admitted-trio live evidence tuple while aligning the higher-level orchestration status brief, the parallel-readiness checklist, and the workflow-first runbook to the published delegated Packet 831 through Packet 836 governance stack and current recommendation posture under explicit coordinator ownership.
dependency_note: Packet 830 remains the helper-bootstrap-toolchains-python3-path floor, Packet 831 remains the delegated split-governance floor, Packet 832 remains the delegated operator prompt template floor, Packet 833 remains the delegated coordinator closeout template floor, Packet 834 remains the delegated packet-definition template floor, Packet 835 remains the higher-level orchestration entry-surface alignment floor, and Packet 836 remains the active plan and authority control-surface alignment floor. This packet reuses those preserved contracts to refresh the remaining live guidance and recommendation surfaces rather than reopening helper hardening or controller scope.
required_inputs: The current recommendation in PROJECT_STATUS.md that the next truthful value is another delegated packet reusing the Packet 831 through Packet 834 stack with a new disjoint lane objective while preserving the Packet 835 and Packet 836 aligned surfaces
The delegated ownership, validation, and abort pattern in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-EXECUTION-CHECKLIST-2026-05-13.md
The reusable operator prompt structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-OPERATOR-PROMPT-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The reusable coordinator closeout structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-COORDINATOR-CLOSEOUT-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The reusable delegated packet-definition structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-PACKET-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The unchanged helper execution surface and focused truthfulness suite
constrained_outputs: One fresh Packet 837 admitted-trio live evidence tuple emitted through tools/ai/run_authoritative_host_packet.py under tests/canary/host-bootstrap-status/actual and tests/canary/mcp-contract/actual

One disjoint higher-level guidance refresh limited to docs/operations/OLARES-MVP-AI-ORCHESTRATION-STATUS-BRIEF-2026-05-10.md, docs/operations/OLARES-AI-PARALLEL-TASK-READINESS-CHECKLIST-2026-05-10.md, and docs/architecture/OLARES-AI-WORKFLOW-FIRST-SLICE-RUNBOOK-2026-05-06.md
One coordinator-owned closeout handoff for Packet 837 plus shared status-surface updates only after both lane validations and host parity restoration succeed
An explicit ABORTED closeout instead of partial success if lane ownership drifts, the helper surface requires mutation, or validation fails

lane_a.name: helper-driven live host evidence lane
allowed_actions: run the focused helper truthfulness pytest slice
publish only the Packet 837 artifact tuple emitted by the unchanged helper
forbidden_actions: changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, or business logic

lane_b.name: guidance refresh lane
allowed_actions: align the orchestration status brief to the published delegated Packet 831 through Packet 836 governance stack and current recommendation posture
align the parallel-readiness checklist to the current delegated Packet 831 through Packet 836 proof floor and template reuse guidance
align the workflow-first runbook to the current delegated Packet 831 through Packet 836 execution posture without changing admitted services or runtime boundaries
forbidden_actions: editing live artifact files under tests/canary
changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, admitted services, or business logic

required_combined_checks: both lane-level validation tuples are present
the live helper result is PASS for Packet 837
the host returns to truthful not-running rest state
authoritative-host parity is restored without widening scope

execution_gate: Ready after Packet 836 publication and authoritative-host parity restoration on 2026-05-14.
publication_note: Lane A and Lane B validated cleanly, the Packet 837 closeout set was published, and authoritative-host parity was restored at the same clean head using only the bounded generated-artifact blocker remediation authorized by the delegated checklist.
